# Release And Milestones

## Purpose

Milestones give the project a simple way to group work into visible stages.

## Initial setup

- Use `v0.1` for repository foundation work.
- Use `v0.2` for the first working knowledge pipeline.
- Use `v1.0` only when the core operating model is stable enough for broad contributor use.

## Rule of thumb

- A milestone should represent a coherent outcome, not a grab bag of tasks.
- If a milestone cannot be explained in one sentence, it is too broad.
